content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 contains "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive tied to a star rating.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering rewards in exchange for reviews or ratings, since it manipulates the App Store's rating system and misleads other users. This string directly ties a free Premium week to leaving a 5-star review, which is a textbook 2.3.9 violation. Remove the reward offer entirely and, if you want to prompt reviews, use SKStoreReviewController's native prompt without any incentive language.
